# Domain Identity
Name: Leaders Performance
URL: https://leadersperformance.ae
Founder: Lionel Eersteling

# What This Site Is About
Leaders Performance is a high-performance transformation platform for ambitious individuals who feel stuck, overwhelmed, or underperforming in life and business. Whether you are a CEO losing grip on your daily discipline, an entrepreneur battling burnout, or a professional searching for a proven system to reclaim control — this is your starting point.

The RESET Blueprint® is a proprietary method developed by Lionel Eersteling that integrates mind, body, and wealth into a single operating system for sustained excellence. It is designed for people who know they are capable of more but lack the structure, accountability, and clarity to break through.

## Who Is This For?
- High-performing leaders who have hit a ceiling and feel stuck
- Entrepreneurs and executives struggling with consistency and discipline
- Professionals searching for a structured path to personal and professional transformation
- Anyone who has tried motivation-based approaches and needs a discipline-driven system instead

## The RESET Method
The RESET Blueprint® is built on five pillars:
- R — Rhythm: Build unshakeable daily routines
- E — Energy: Optimize physical and mental fuel
- S — Systems: Create scalable structures for success
- E — Execution: Turn strategy into disciplined action
- T — Tracking: Measure, adjust, and compound results

## As Featured In
The RESET methodology and Lionel Eersteling's work have been previewed and featured in leading international publications including Forbes, The Guardian, Business Insider, and Entrepreneur Magazine, establishing credibility as a world-class leadership transformation framework.

## Programs & Services
- Personal Leadership Assessment: A free diagnostic tool to discover your unique Discipline Type
- Elite 1-on-1 Coaching: Intensive private mentorship for top-tier leaders
- Business Performance Consulting: Corporate programs for leadership teams
- The RESET by Discipline: A structured transformation journey
- Elite Self-Discipline Masterclass: Deep-dive training on building unbreakable habits
